privileged_info_summary: All verifiable metadata claims are correct. The task uses official Aerobridge fixture data from the GitHub repository (https://github.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge). Aircraft F1 #2 exists with ID 0450852f-856e-4ecb-beb6-01ccded8529d. Pilot Niteesh Taral Pavani has Pilot ID d4b8aa2c-0a52-4adc-806a-f363deb6a1e0. Operator Electric Inspection has Operator ID 566d63bb-cb1c-42dc-9a51-baef0d0a8d04. Existing FlightPlan 'Flight Plan A' has ID 12818e87-4c96-4e4c-8c63-82b8e12c3b73. Admin credentials are username 'admin' with password 'adminpass123'. Kolkata port coordinates are approximately 22.5626°N, 88.3630°E.
